ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Continued To Jan-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Breach Of Contract; (2) Unjust Enrichment; (3) Claim To Property Under Probate Code Section 850; (4) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; (5) Breach Of Duty As Set Forth In Family Code Section 1101; (6) Violation Of Family Code Sectio 1102
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Poniatowski appeared by zoom for Elana Weinstein (Petitioner).
Patrick Doyle appeared by zoom for and with Karen Gonzalez (Administrator) by zoom.

Mr. Poniatowski stated that they have made progress in the last week or so, that they are relatively close, that they have made a draft of a settlement agreement and that it is not final, but close. Mr. Doyle stated that he agrees, that they have exchanged proposals and that they are mostly there. The Petition Breach of Contract, etc. is continued to January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

Petition For (1) Breach Of Contract; (2) Unjust Enrichment; (3) Claim To Property Under Probate Code Section 850; (4) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; (5) Breach Of Duty As Set Forth In Family Code Section 1101; (6) Violation Of Family Code Sectio 1102
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Breach Of Contract; (2) Unjust Enrichment; (3) Claim To Property Under Probate Code Section 850; (4) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; (5) Breach Of Duty As Set Forth In Family Code Section 1101; (6) Violation Of Family Code Sectio 1102
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Breach Of Contract; (2) Unjust Enrichment; (3) Claim To Property Under Probate Code Section 850; (4) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; (5) Breach Of Duty As Set Forth In Family Code Section 1101; (6) Violation Of Family Code Sectio 1102
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Poniatowski appeared by zoom for Elana Weinstein.
Patrick Doyle appeared by zoom for and with Karen Gonzalez (by zoom).

The Court asks whether the parties are interested in mediation. Mr. Doyle stated that he proposed mediation in February and that he received rejection of it. Mr. Poniatowski stated that they already had private mediation in January, that they filed the creditor's claim in October 2019, and that they had various communication and was told by Ms. Gonzalez's Former Counsel at that time that they may be able to work this out informally. Mr. Poniatowski also stated that he thought they had made progress, but Ms. Gonzalez got new Counsel and seems to have changed her position, and that he does not think mediation will be productive. In addition, Mr. Poniatowski stated that they are conducting written discovery, that they had a productive meet and confer last week, and that in his view discovery should be wrapped in fairly short order. Furthermore, Mr. Poniatowski stated that there may be a possibility of a dispositive motion, that he believes this is a clear contract, that if a dispositive motion is not granted there will be some limited depositions and some expert discovery, and that they can then proceed with a trial. Mr. Poniatowski also raised the issue of an inventory and appraisal being due within four months from the date letters are issued to the Personal Representative, and stated that they have not received an inventory and appraisal. Mr. Doyle stated that he was not aware of it and that he will speak with the Administrator about the inventory and appraisal. The Petition for Breach of Contract, etc. is continued to October 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
